strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with diverse tech stacks (JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, Python, etc.)
Direct experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators)
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective, demonstrating AI/geospatial product development
concerns: No explicit evidence of AI expertise with recognized products/platforms built using AI (preferred qualification)
Lacks a Master's/PhD in AI-related field and no clear recognition as an AI expert
Limited cloud-specific experience (only AWS CDK mentioned, no deep cloud architecture or strategy)

key_factors.factor: Cloud or AI expertise (builder, code, design fluency)

response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum experience requirement with 15+ years in software engineering, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work. However, they lack evidence of recognized AI expertise (e.g., no AI-related PhD/Master's, no clear AI-powered products/platforms), which is a preferred qualification and heavily weighted. Cloud expertise is limited to AWS CDK, with no deep architectural experience. Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) partially offsets the AI gap but doesn't fully compensate.
